infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ShopWell needs access to your camera to scan product barcodes and QR codes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ShopWell needs access to your photo library to let you select images for your shopping lists.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ShopWell needs access to your microphone to record voice notes for your shopping lists.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: ShopWell would like to access your contacts to help you share shopping lists with friends and family.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ShopWell needs your location to show nearby stores and provide location-based features.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ShopWell needs your location to notify you when you're near stores with active shopping lists.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: ShopWell needs your location to notify you when you're near stores with active shopping lists.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: ShopWell would like to track your activity to provide personalized shopping recommendations and improve your experience.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Allow ShopWell.ai to send you notifications about product alerts and updates.
infoPlist.NSAppTrackingTransparencyUsageDescriptio: Your data will be used to deliver personalized ads and improve your experience.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: ShopWell uses Face ID to securely authenticate and protect your account.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ShopWell needs your location to notify you when you're near stores with active shopping lists.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: ShopWell needs your location to notify you when you're near stores with active shopping lists.
